risk_if_not_implemented: Without Validation & Sanitization, residual security, compliance, or resilience risk may accumulate, potentially leading to control failures or non-compliance.

compensating_control_1.name: Input Data Validation
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to check the validity of information inputs.
compensating_control_1.justification: Input Data Validation (TDA-18) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Validation & Sanitization (WEB-09) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Secure Software Development Practices (SSDP)
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to develop applications based on Secure Software Development Practices (SSDP).
compensating_control_2.justification: Secure Software Development Practices (SSDP) (TDA-06) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Validation & Sanitization (WEB-09) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
